overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, crowded pedestrian plazas, and heavy atmospheric fog. The camera moves from elevated walkways down through covered plazas to busy street intersections with large digital billboards.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins exiting a concrete archway into heavy rain, ascending stairs onto an elevated walkway. Two pedestrians walk ahead, one with a distinctive green umbrella, while a tall building with vertical red neon lighting dominates the right side of the frame.

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left along the elevated walkway railing, passing a pedestrian in a purple jacket, then descends stairs toward a covered plaza. Steam rises from a building vent on the left, and the red neon building remains visible to the right.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian plaza sheltered from the rain, with fluorescent lighting overhead and digital advertising screens on the left. The crowd density increases with many pedestrians carrying umbrellas, including a notable figure with a conical hat and glowing orange light.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow city street between towering skyscrapers

descending stairs to lower street level

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered plaza into a narrow street canyon between massive skyscrapers that disappear into the fog. The camera descends stairs to street level, passing under an elevated railway track while neon signs illuminate the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with heavy neon advertising

crossing street at marked crosswalk with other pedestrians

segments.scene_description: Walking through a busy intersection at street level, surrounded by massive digital billboards including one reading 'CANT BRE'. The camera crosses the street at a crosswalk, passing palm trees and under a large directional gantry sign, while a black car drives through the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked elevated walkway down into the neon-drenched depths of a crowded cyberpunk street intersection. It begins by exiting a concrete archway and ascending stairs into heavy rain, passing pedestrians under the glow of a tall building with vertical red neon lighting. As the camera turns and descends from the walkway, the scene shifts from the open rain into a sheltered pedestrian plaza filled with fluorescent lights, digital screens, and a dense crowd of umbrella-carrying figures. The movement then carries the viewer out of the plaza and down a set of stairs into a narrow street canyon, where massive skyscrapers disappear into a thick atmospheric fog beneath an elevated railway track. Finally, the camera emerges into a busy street-level intersection, crossing a rain-soaked road past palm trees and under a large gantry sign while surrounded by towering digital billboards.
